3014750.name: Cursed House 7
3014750.description:
Cursed House 7 is a Match 3 Puzzle game. It features 2 sets of levels: for fans of challenging gameplay and for regular players. The bonus system has also been changed; only one figure can create power-ups. If this figure is not present in a level, it won't be possible to create power-ups in that level.

Additionally, new mechanics have been added to the game - electricity and papyrus.

The game includes:

105 Match 3 levels
2 Hidden Object scenes
8 Spot the difference scenes
20 solitaires
A new location to cleanse from the evil spirits
